title: rubus delectus
intro: Rubus delectus, also known as the raspberry leaf plant, is a perennial shrub native to various parts of the world, particularly in the temperate regions. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus delectus include its ability to support menstrual health, reduce menopausal symptoms, and provide relief from gastrointestinal issues. Rubus delectus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
